calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Texas Proceeding
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Texas Proceeding
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Establishment Of Special Needs Trust; Setting Medicare Set-Asideamount; Transferring On Going Court Jurisdiction To Texas; Ect.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Petitioner.

The Court granted the Petition for Establishment of A Special Needs Trust and Fees (subject to receipt of a revised order). The Court did not approve purchase of the van or the home improvment stating that the matter is upto the Texas Court to decide. Status of the Texas proceeding was set for February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.
